{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Skimmer Drives
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Skimmer Drives]] used in [[Divine Titans]] are efficient over short distances.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
